market: Central Wisconsin (Wausau / Schofield / Weston / Mosinee / Merrill)
notes: v2 EXPLICIT LABOR MODEL (adopted by Jim 2026-07-09). Materials carry TRUE COST only (no sell rates); labor = task hours x loaded rate; ONE margin on top. All costs are EVERYDAY shelf prices (standing rule: never assume the Menards 11% rebate). Flip status to 'active' to cut the live estimator over to this engine; flip back to 'draft' to roll back. pricing-db.json (v1) is frozen as the audit record of every price quoted before cutover.
research_source: Research sweep 2026-07-09: Menards Wausau live SKU prices, DecksDirect + AdvantageLumber TimberTech retail, BLS OEWS Wausau wages, published production-rate data. See plan: explicit-labor pricing model.
_confidence_note: Every priced entry carries confidence: 'researched' (live store/retailer price or Jim-confirmed), 'estimate' (industry figure pending a dealer sheet). verify_engine.py lists all remaining 'estimate' entries - this replaces the old CONFIRM WITH JOHN markers.

labor._model: SIMPLE CREW-DAYS (Jim 2026-07-11): labor = crew_days x crew_size x hours_per_day x loaded_rate_per_hr, printed on the estimate EXACTLY as that math. crew_days = (base_days + days_per_100 x area/100 + extras) x site multipliers + contingency_days, rounded to the nearest 0.5 day. All values are CREW-DAYS (whole 3-man crew) in 0.25-day steps - read them like a calendar.
labor.contingency_note: One full crew-day added to EVERY job (Jim 2026-07-09): covers contingencies; if the job runs clean it is labor margin.
labor.calibration_note: Calibrated 2026-07-11 so the 320 sf elevated reference deck lands at 4.0 crew-days incl. contingency ($12,000 labor). Overbeck actual: 416 sf stain ~1 crew-day-equivalent. Tune any value in 0.25-day steps; site multipliers (height/grade/complexity) scale calculated days before contingency.

pricing_model_note: PRICE = materials_cost / (1 - margin) x market_load + labor (day math, at face) + allowances (at face). Margin applies to MATERIALS ONLY (Jim 2026-07-11): labor profit lives in the $125 rate itself. All client-facing figures round to the nearest $50.

footings.count_rule: count = footing_count input if given, else max(4, ceil(deck_sf / 32))
footings.source: Jim-confirmed true material cost 2026-07-09 (Diamond Pier, no Sonotube/concrete). Reference alternative: 12in x 48in tube + 7 bags + bracket = ~$58 at Menards Wausau.

stair_materials.note: Tread cost covers decking-material treads + riser stock; stringer set = 3x PT 2x12 per run.

stain_materials.source: Menards Wausau: Cabot solid $51.96-55.99, semi-solid $50.96 (live 2026-07-09); SW SuperDeck $43-58

repair_materials.source: Menards Wausau board/joist stock 2026-07-09; allowances carried from v1

allowances.note: Hard costs, passed through AT FACE VALUE (never margin-inflated) in v2 line items.

condition_multipliers._note: v2: these multiply LABOR HOURS of physical-work buckets, never material dollars. Values carried from v1 as the starting point; labor-hours height factor likely wants 1.4-1.6 (calibration item, step 10). market_load is NOT a cost: it multiplies the price of margin-type rungs only.

margin_and_contingency.notes: Margin = Cost / (1 - margin_pct) on TRUE cost (materials at cost + labor at loaded rate + allowances). ONE margin - the v1 double-stack (margined sell rates + margin divisor) is gone. default_contingency is the display-only +/- band.

stain_rates_note: v1 blended stain_rates_per_sf retired; v2 prices stain as materials (gallons) + labor (prep + per-coat hours).
demo_note: v1 demo_rates_per_sf ($3/6/8) retired; v2 demo = hours x rate via production_rates demo_* keys; disposal cost lives in the dumpster allowance.

project_types.name: Stain Only
project_types.description: Clean, prep, and stain an existing structurally sound deck.

project_types.name: Resurface (Boards Only)
project_types.description: Strip walking surface, keep frame, install new boards.

project_types.name: Frame + Deck Rebuild (Keep Footings)
project_types.description: New frame and surface on existing footings.

project_types.name: Full Tear-Out + New Build
project_types.description: Complete demolition including footings. New build from grade up.

project_types.name: New Build (No Tear-Out)
project_types.description: New deck on a clear site.

project_types.name: Fence
project_types.description: Fence build, priced by linear foot: materials at cost + install hours.

takeoff._note: Piece-level rules for the Materials & Hardware List PDF (replaces the emailed Excel workbook). Benchmarked against Menards deck-builder outputs; quantities are order-list heuristics, reconciled against the engine materials subtotal on the PDF footer.
